recommendations.title: Everybody Wants Some!!
recommendations.overview: A comedy that follows a group of friends as they navigate their way through the freedoms and responsibilities of unsupervised adulthood.

recommendations.title: Boyhood
recommendations.overview: The film tells a story of a divorced couple trying to raise their young son. The story follows the boy for twelve years, from first grade at age 6 through 12th grade at age 17-18, and examines his relationship with his parents as he grows.

recommendations.title: SubUrbia
recommendations.overview: A group of suburban teenagers try to support each other through the difficult task of becoming adults.

recommendations.title: Fast Food Nation
recommendations.overview: A dramatised examination of the health issues and social consequences of America's love affair with fast food.

recommendations.title: Bohemian Rhapsody
recommendations.overview: Singer Freddie Mercury, guitarist Brian May, drummer Roger Taylor and bass guitarist John Deacon take the music world by storm when they form the rock 'n' roll band Queen in 1970. Hit songs become instant classics. When Mercury's increasingly wild li

recommendations.title: The Newton Boys
recommendations.overview: The story of the Newton gang, the most successful bank robbers in history, owing to their good planning and minimal violence.

recommendations.title: A Scanner Darkly
recommendations.overview: An undercover cop in a not-too-distant future becomes involved with a dangerous new drug and begins to lose his own identity as a result.

recommendations.title: Apollo 10½: A Space Age Childhood
recommendations.overview: A man narrates stories of his life as a 10-year-old boy in 1969 Houston, weaving tales of nostalgia with a fantastical account of a journey to the moon.

recommendations.title: Hit Man
recommendations.overview: A mild-mannered professor moonlighting as a fake hit man in police stings ignites a chain reaction of trouble when he falls for a potential client.

recommendations.title: Where'd You Go, Bernadette
recommendations.overview: When architect-turned-recluse Bernadette Fox goes missing prior to a family trip to Antarctica, her 15-year-old daughter, Bee, goes on a quest with Bernadette's husband to find her.
